evals.prompt: ok the pilot looks good, i want to run the full experiment now but i'm nervous about cost. can you show me what it'll cost and then start with the cheapest model first?
evals.expected_output: Shows dry-run cost estimate, suggests starting with free OpenRouter model, provides execution commands in recommended order.
expectations: Shows the recommended execution order (free → cheap → expensive)
Provides the specific CLI commands with --model flags

evals.prompt: the experiment got interrupted overnight - i think my laptop went to sleep. how do I pick up where it left off?
evals.expected_output: Explains resumability, suggests re-running the same command which auto-skips completed runs.
expectations: Explains that the engine is resumable by design
Says to just re-run the same propt run command
Explains that completed run IDs are skipped automatically
Suggests checking progress first with /check-results or sqlite3 query
Does NOT suggest any destructive action (no re-running completed items)

evals.prompt: i want to run just the prompt_repetition intervention across all models to see if the google technique actually works before running everything else
evals.expected_output: Shows the targeted command for running a single intervention.
expectations: Provides the correct filtered command: propt run --intervention prompt_repetition
Suggests doing a dry-run first for that specific filter
Explains what prompt repetition does (duplicate input per Leviathan et al.)
Suggests comparing results against raw baseline after completion
